title: The Seeking
description: This project is based on "The Broken Script" and "no_moon.jar".
body:
![Title4](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1aa5073e420a291785bf5a83ab89e07d27996751_0.webp)

# MAIN
## EPILEPSY & SOUND WARNING
Note: This mod is currently in Pre-Alpha, its currently an early access.

If you are a horror mod fan, you can download this! :)

This mod is a horror mod based on "The Broken Script" and "no_moon.jar".
It does not do anything to your pc! The mod is about a player who got possessed by an entity. You can read the story if you want.

**This mod adds:**
- 3 NEW ENTITIES
- 2 NEW EVENTS
- 2 NEW BLOCKS

**The Entities:**
- TV Dude
- Corrupt (ranzz)
- The Seeker ("It was smiling..." -Story)
- DhHs (next update)
- Alternative (next update)
- 6leg (not confirmed)

**The Events:**
- Camera Shake
- Chat Spam
- Kick (ONLY ONCE!!!)
- Time Change
- Dimension Teleport

**The Blocks:**
- Corruption (unbreakable, all over the map)
- Hell Floor (unaccessible)

**The Dimensions:**
- 1213
- Bedrockland
- Fear

# STORY

<details>
<summary>Spoiler!!</summary>

On February 22, 2020, a player named "ranzz" downloaded Minecraft.
He made a world. Everything normal.
As usual, everything in the world is beautiful.

Until...

He gathered resources, made a house and entered a cave.
He found coal, iron and gold but... No diamonds?
That is very weird. Ranzz said:

- No diamonds? I have been mining for so long! Meh, maybe next time.

And logged off for the day.
The next day, he logged back on!
He mined, mined, mined until Y Level -32.
He heard a loud slam echoing from far away.
He was terrified... But he also wanted to know what made that sound.
So he started mining in the direction where the sound came from.
And when he was there, he saw nothing.
But suddenly he saw a player-shaped entity for a single frame.
It was smiling.
Ranzz was so terrified and ran out the cave:

- What was that..?

And 5 seconds later, a distorted music started to play.
After that, he was kicked:

"ERROR: 0"

He joined back and heard the slam again.
But it was louder.

It escaped.

</details>
